calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Joseph P. Corey; Declaration Of Nilda M. Ilumin
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Corey appeared in person for Nilda Ilumin (petitioner).

Mr. Corey stated that the supplement addresses the venue issue, that the principal place the trust was administered was in San Francisco, that decedent lived in San Francisco and died in San Francisco.

The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.


Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
